classifications.phrase: decided to increase the cash rate target by 25 basis points
CPI inflation over the year to the December quarter was 7.8 per cent
strong domestic demand is adding to the inflationary pressures
tighter financial conditions will constrain spending more broadly
The labour market remains very tight
Wages growth is continuing to pick up
The Boards priority is to return inflation to target
further increases in interest rates will be needed over the months ahead
The Board remains resolute in its determination to return inflation to target

payload.rationale: The RBA signals a hawkish stance focused primarily on inflation control, with multiple references to high inflation, wage pressures, and commitment to further rate increases, while acknowledging growth and employment risks.
